summary: SMC Auto Mark feature testing — frontend only. All 8 test assertions passed. Verified SMC toggle button, canvas overlay rendering, active/inactive toggle state, and chart data load with FVG/Liquidity/OB overlays drawing correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: SMC canvas dimensions are 300x150 (default canvas size) until chart/stock data loads — this is expected React canvas behavior; no bug.

drawSMCCanvas uses rAF loop continuously even when no SMC data available (smcDataRef.current null check in drawSMCCanvas itself handles this gracefully). Minor CPU usage when smcActive=true but no stock selected.
bg-[#F5A623]/8 arbitrary Tailwind opacity works correctly in current Tailwind v3 build.
ChartPanel.jsx is 1048 lines — approaching file size limit (700-line recommendation). Consider splitting into ChartToolbar, ChartCanvas, SMCLayer subcomponents in future phases.
index.js: ./index.css import fix confirmed working (was previously @/index.css causing CRA build failure).
context_for_next_testing_agent: SMC Auto Mark feature fully tested and working. Key facts: smcActive=true by default, smc-toggle button (data-testid='smc-toggle') shows gold/orange border when active, SMC canvas is at z-index:4 with pointer-events:none, VP canvas at z-index:5. After stock load (RELIANCE tested), SMC canvas resizes to full chart (1120x519) and draws 30,248+ pixels (FVG boxes, swing high/low lines, order blocks). Toggle click correctly cycles active→inactive (canvas hidden, no gold border) and inactive→active (canvas visible, gold border restored). Frontend compiles cleanly. Backend health: ok v3.0.0.

tests_passed: SMC button has active gold styling on initial load (smcActive=true default)
SMC canvas found: z-index=4, pointer-events=none, display=block
VP canvas found: z-index=5, display=none (correct — no stock loaded yet)
SMC toggle click → deactivates: canvas display=none, no gold styling
SMC toggle click again → reactivates: canvas display=block, gold styling restored
After RELIANCE stock load: SMC canvas sized to full chart (1120x519px)
After RELIANCE stock load: SMC canvas has 30,248 drawn pixels (FVG/Liquidity/OB active)
All toolbar buttons visible: smc-toggle, gann-toggle, log-toggle, tf-1D, tf-1H
Chart placeholder not visible after stock selection (chart loaded)
smc-toggle title attribute: 'SMC Auto Mark — FVG + Liquidity + Order Blocks'
Frontend webpack compiled successfully (no parse errors)
